_comment: Canonical weekly wind-tunnel grid — the money-flow audit's top questions (V1 cluster caps, V5 universe floor, V2 falling-knife) PLUS the W27-W29 recurring structural finding: momentum vol-scaling (residual vs residual_riskadj — does dividing by formation vol cut the high-sigma-leader loss tail without costing return?). Versioned; edit + git push to change what the weekly sweep tests. Windows are RELATIVE (anchored to run day) so this never goes stale. 54 configs at rebalance_every=5 — TIME THE FIRST REAL RUN (see backtester-v2-plan runtime caveat); trim a dimension if it overruns the Fri-evening → Sat-morning window.
